name: International Recovery Solutions
description_short: International Recovery Solutions is a debt relief provider based in Los Angeles, California. Rated 5.0/5 on Google.
description_long:
International Recovery Solutions is a debt relief provider serving clients in Los Angeles, California. The company serves consumers in the Los Angeles area who are looking to manage and reduce their outstanding debts.

Operating as a data recovery service, International Recovery Solutions provides a range of services for consumers seeking debt relief solutions.

Debt relief services in Los Angeles can range from debt management plans to settlement negotiations. International Recovery Solutions should be evaluated based on their fee structure, success rate, and how their program may affect your credit score. Legitimate debt relief providers are typically registered with the state, and consumers should verify credentials and check for complaints with the CFPB and state attorney general before enrolling in any program.

Consumers in the Los Angeles, California area who are considering International Recovery Solutions should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any debt relief provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
